top_signals.title: How Many Barrels of Oil Do AI Data Centers Consume on a Daily Basis?
top_signals.summary: Back in 2017, we did the math to figure out how much oil it takes to mine a single Bitcoin. The answer then was about 20 barrels of oil equivalent per coin. Today it's closer to 500. The Bitcoin network now draws somewhere between 138 and 175 terawatt-hours a year, depending on whose model you trust…  Split across the roughly 164,000 coins minted annually since the last halving, that lands at around 500 barrels of oil equivalent at today’s prices per Bitcoin, and past 600 on the higher estimates.  But Bitcoin is the warm-up…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran Oil Waiver Offers Lifeline to Tehran as Talks Proceed
top_signals.summary: The US issued a 60-day license allowing Iran to sell oil on the international market, giving Tehran an economic lifeline as the two adversaries continued talks for a permanent peace deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: International Chamber of Shipping Appoints John Denholm as Chairman of the Board
top_signals.summary: The Board of the International Chamber of Shipping (ICS) has unanimously elected John Denholm CBE as Chairman of the Board.The decision was made by the ICS Board of Directors at the organization's Annual General Meeting, held at Palazzo Valentini in Rome…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Alamos logs multiple high-grade hits at Island Gold
top_signals.summary: The exploration update “should be viewed as more important than the seismicity issues at Young-Davidson,” analyst says.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: TurboFlow, aiming to be the ‘Kalshi of APAC,’ raises $6 million seed led by Pantera Capital
top_signals.summary: The platform offers prediction markets and perpetual futures and aims to be a localized alternative to Kalshi and Polymarket for Asian users.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
